title: Ship ‘Spoofing’ in Strait of Hormuz May Compound Confusion
summary_full: A new pattern of deceptive activity by some vessels around the critical waterway suggests the new American blockade is changing how some ships linked to Iran are behaving.
summary_public: A new pattern of deceptive activity by some vessels around the critical waterway suggests the new American blockade is changing how some ships linked to Iran are behaving.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: ships linked to Iran are behaving.
